reviews.review_description: The game is very good but I don’t like that they put a timer on it put everything else is good.
This game bucks there's no other levels, and you only get 1 minute to play, then it restarts it's trash.
I like smashing my stuff with weapons so I decided to download this at first it was good but then I got bored because there was only 60 seconds to destroy it all in

reviews.review_title: love it but maybe add a free mode
reviews.review_description: i don’t like the idea of doing it in 60 secs so maybe add a free mode?

This was amazing I would love to see the full game and it has cured my depression and sadness thank you for this and please respond to me if you can at any time or cause I love you this game is amazing and thanks for making it free to play by the way this game was amazing it was way too bad I'm playing my Oculus on charger

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, Taylorsozone! I really glad to hear that my Rage Room helped with the depression, was the goal to smash something without breaking stuff in real-world =) It is sooothing. Your feedback helps me to understand that working on the full game should be a priority, and I'm going to do just that! Stay tuned for updates with more levels and break mechanics.

reviews.review_description: Excellent gaming experience. It's fun to demolish everything around:)

developer_response.body: Glad to hear that! We want to hear how we can help more with your stress, new levels? more weapons? new mechanics?

reviews.review_title: Rage Smash Destroy - Rage Room VR
reviews.review_description:
Having a bad day, love to break stuff and interactive VR games? Well Rage Room VR is what the doctor ordered.

Rage Room VR is a free demo on SideQuest. Its a game where the objective is to destroy everything in 60 seconds, and I do mean everything. You are in a  museum room, where you get to unleash the beast and just destroy. You can use your bare hands or many of the medieval weapons laying around. 

The game is a lot of fun for all ages and easy to play. The hitting mechanics feel really nice. The game also supports room scaling, although not needed. But if you are like me and enjoy walking around in VR, this game has the option. 

The game is also a good workout, swinging your arms like crazy trying to break everything in time. This is an excellent free demo and must be played. The only thing I would like to see added is a free mode with no timer.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/p93_8NAWuEo

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I'm glad you like the demo. It inspires me to work more on the game and most likely you will see a full game with many levels, weapons, and how you asked, the ability to disable the timer and get all the stuff neatly organized into small pieces :)

reviews.review_description: This game is very helpful for ppl with anger issues but im warning ppl to be carefull bc u might hit a cabinet or something.

I love the idea and been looking for a vr rage room due to mental health reasons. Unfortunately it doesn't work on quest 3 at all yet. Game boots up and you can start the timer, but once the timer is going you can't do anything with the controllers anymore.

I Will change my review once Quest 3 is properly supported.

reviews.review_title: Fun but were can I change levels

developer_response.body: This is a demo and I'm going to work on the full game implementation. Stay tuned for updates.
